positive: A stylized, mystical forest creature (like a fusion of an owl and a deer) perched on a single, geometrically perfect branch. The creature should be composed of elegant, flowing silhouette lines, incorporating leaf motifs and crystal shards into its structure. The setting is deep twilight, illuminated by soft, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and gentle moonlight filtering through stylized canopy. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong negative space for clean print contrast. Art style: Highly detailed line art meets modern vector illustration with a magical, ethereal touch. Color direction: Limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, muted gold, and stark black lines. Suitable for high-contrast apparel printing, clean edges only.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, logo, messy, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, extra fingers, poorly drawn, gradient wash, hyperrealistic, low saturation
